key_metrics: Net premiums written of $14.20 billion, up 6.3% YoY
Net investment income of $1.57 billion, up 6.8% YoY
Total assets increased to $261.56 billion from $246.55 billion at year-end 2024
qoq_changes: Net income accelerated significantly in Q2 ($2.97 billion) compared to implied Q1 2025 results ($1.33 billion).
Total investments grew to $158.31 billion from $150.65 billion at the end of 2024.
Unpaid losses and loss expenses increased by $2.37 billion since year-end 2024.
new_risks: Continued growth in unpaid losses and loss expenses, which reached $86.38 billion.
Potential exposure to foreign currency translation volatility, though currently favorable with a $796 million positive adjustment in Q2.
management_tone: Bullish, as evidenced by strong top-line premium growth, higher investment yields, and a significant 33% year-over-year increase in net income.
analyst_note: Chubb delivered a highly profitable Q2 2025, driven by steady premium growth and robust investment income. The 33.1% jump in net income highlights excellent underwriting and operational efficiency, positioning the firm well for the second half of the year.
